title: Gymnopteris triangularis
taxonomy: Gymnopteris triangularis is classified as a species of fern in the family Osmundaceae. It belongs to the genus Gymnopteris and is a type of vascular plant. As a member of the Osmundaceae family, it is closely related to other species of ferns such as Osmunda and Leptopteris. Gymnopteris triangularis is also classified as a part of the division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns and their allies. The classification of Gymnopteris triangularis reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.

The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as cancer and heart disease.
